label: PERSONAL PROJECT · THOUGHT LEADERSHIP
headline: Thought Leadership Campaign
description: Designed a 5-week visual storytelling campaign on LinkedIn. Used a historical narrative to position senior design expertise against tech evolution, driving high profile C-suite engagement.

label: KAISER PERMANENTE · VIDEO VISIT
headline: Closing the Doctor-Patient Gap
description: Video Visit is an A-Z streamlined flow with one-tap joins, on a lightweight platform. Added trust elements like clear easy to understand inline help, and realtime human dial-up support.

label: Kaiser Permanente · IOS APP DESIGN
headline: Chemotherapy Side Effects App
description: Designed intuitive iOS interface with decision-based navigation, visual trackers, and clinician alerts. Added cloud syncing, and clinician dashboards for immediate response to emergencies.

label: KAISER PERMANENTE · KP.ORG
headline: Healthcare at Your Fingertips
description: Developed dashboard with biometric logins, self-serve appointment, payments, credit card number management. Clinic wait-times, refill alerts, and 1-step reorder by mail.

label: AI CODE ASSISTANT · WEB-BASED APP
headline: Extract product DNA from any URL
description: Using one URL, Design MD extracted our visual DNA into DESIGN.md for AI agents while auditing our PRD, architecture, a test plan and copy to ensure full project alignment.

label: PERSONAL PROJECT · LDOGE.APP
headline: Plug Your Financial Leaks
description: End-to-end design for a personal finance assistant. Built user flows for rapid bank syncing, proactive alerts for hidden fees, and an active dashboard that uncovers immediate savings.

label: PERSONAL PROJECT · CUSTOM CMS DESIGN
headline: Bespoke Admin Dashboard
description: Designed a sleek, node-based portfolio CMS featuring an intuitive layout for project management, drag-and-drop media ordering, client logo curation, and seamless live updates.

label: PERSONAL PROJECT · FAMILYVAULT APP
headline: Family Information Network
description: Designed a private network dashboard for families to track important dates, clothing sizes, color preferences, and wishlists, featuring an AI-powered birthday gift assistant.
